## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Benchmark template proposal (public)
- [ ] Compaction method submission (see docs/submitting.md)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check` and `ruff format --check` pass
- [ ] `pyright` passes
- [ ] Added or updated tests for changed behavior
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Did not commit hidden benchmark content or secrets
